name: App Versions
summary: Install any earlier or newer version of already installed Nextcloud apps
goal: App Versions gives Nextcloud administrators the ability to roll back apps to previous versions or install specific newer versions. This is essential for debugging, testing compatibility, and recovering from broken updates. The app queries the Nextcloud app store API for all available releases, displays them in a clean UI, and handles the download + installation process.
author: Conduction B.V.
